labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Bug Description

> A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

---

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

---

## Expected Behavior

What did you expect to happen?

---

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened? Include error messages, stack traces, or screenshots.

```
paste error or stack trace here
```

---

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| OS | e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04 |
| Version / Commit | e.g. v1.2.0 or commit hash |
| Browser (if applicable) | e.g. Chrome 123 |
| Node / Python / etc. | e.g. Node 20.x |

---

## Possible Fix

> (Optional) Suggest what might be causing the issue or how to fix it.

---

## Additional Context

> Any other context, logs, or links relevant to the bug.
